productDisplayName: Nike Women AS Regular DF Cotton Black Track Pants
description: CompositionBlack trackpants made of 61% cotton, 33% polyester and 6% spandex, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a broad waistband, and embroidered nike swoosh logo on the left hipFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean, bleach or lay on itself when wetTumble dry lowDo not ironDesigned for the woman who never compromises on comfort and style, this trackpant from Nike is crafted from a cotton-polyester-spandex blend fabric to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering fit. The Dri-Fit technology ensures you enjoy your training sessions and casual outings in sweat-free comfort. Add on sporty t-shirts and sneakers.
